title: Binding(mode: sink, providerRef type: jdbcsink).spec.options
description: Shape-only fragment (docs/planning/08 E5, D3), migrated from jdbcsink.ValidateBindingOptions. format is required and restricted to avro|protobuf — stricter than every other provider in this codebase, deliberate: kafka-connect-jdbc cannot derive column names/types from a schemaless json record. deadLetter is accepted only to avoid additionalProperties:false rejecting it (shape owned by binding.FromEnvelope at the Kind level).
